message:
✨ Move language selector and presentation mode to user dropdown (#604)

Declutter the navbar by moving these controls to the user profile dropdown:
- Language selector with expandable submenu
- Presentation mode toggle with visual switch

This reduces navbar clutter while keeping controls easily accessible.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
